first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. The minor differences in wording, such as rephrasing concerns about customer advisory experience, are well within the scope of normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce new concepts or shift the core assessment. The evaluation does not appear to have been influenced by the change in location.
